column1: New Verdania smells a combination of ozone and stale synth-noodles.
column2: In the year 2142, New Verdania is a cyberpunk city with extreme wealth disparity. The lower classes live under a haze of neon lights and holographic advertisements, while the wealthy elite reside in purified skyscrapers that pierce the clouds. We meet Elias, a cynical yet talented underground hacker with an old mechanical left arm, living in the lower levels. Meanwhile, Lyra, a cold and efficient corporate agent from the upper echelons, is introduced as she carries out her duties with unwavering loyalty to the ruling conglomerates.
